# Project Rules

Read and follow the rules in these files before writing any code:

- `.agents/rules/architecture.md` — rendering model, routing, Tailwind v4, Cloudflare edge
- `.agents/rules/astro-conventions.md` — island hydration strategy, state management
- `.agents/skills/building-storefronts/SKILL.md` — SDK, React Query, Medusa API
- `.agents/skills/storefront-best-practices/SKILL.md` — UI/UX, components, backend integration
